---
title: "Proteomics Data Analysis"
description: "Scripts, functions, and snippets for processing and analyzing proteomics data."
---

This repository collects scripts, functions, and snippets useful for processing and analyzing different types of proteomics data.

The public README currently highlights utility scripts for basic MaxQuant output checks, including counts of protein groups and peptide-spectrum matches with target-decoy information.

## Highlights

- General proteomics data-analysis utilities.
- Early reusable code collection for processing and checking proteomics outputs.
- Practical scripts for common mass-spectrometry data-analysis tasks.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/MiguelCos/1_Proteomics_data_analysis)

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`proteomics`]{.tag} [`utilities`]{.tag}
:::
